description: Generates the sample space for drawing balls with replacement. After each draw the ball is returned, so probabilities stay the same for each draw. Each draw is independent.

arguments.name: bagLabel
arguments.description: Label of the bag to draw from

examples.scenario: Draw 2 from bag A with replacement
examples.expression:
bags("A")
balls("A", "red", 3, c(red))
balls("A", "blue", 2, c(blue))
P = pickWithReplace("A", 2, at(4,10), view(10,10))
